steps.title: Find the sentence boundary
steps.content: The text contains two complete thoughts: thousands of women joined the war effort as nurses, and Ann Bradford Stokes was among them. Two independent clauses need a proper boundary between them.

steps.title: Separate the two clauses
steps.content: A creates a comma splice, B creates a run-on, and D uses awkward punctuation around "and" that does not cleanly connect the clauses. The answer is C.
